import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def get_observation(state) -> jnp.ndarray:
    H, W = state.grid.shape[:2]
    H_f = jnp.float32(H)
    W_f = jnp.float32(W)

    DIRECTIONS = jnp.array([(-1, 0), (0, 1), (1, 0), (0, -1)], dtype=jnp.int32)

    # --- Agent info ---
    agent_y = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    norm_ay = agent_y / (H_f - 1)
    norm_ax = agent_x / (W_f - 1)
    dir_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.direction, 4)  # (4,)

    # --- Pocket info ---
    pocket_tile = state.agent.pocket[0].astype(jnp.float32) / 12.0
    pocket_color = state.agent.pocket[1].astype(jnp.float32) / 11.0
    pocket_empty = (state.agent.pocket[0] == 0).astype(jnp.float32)
    # Holding green ball = tile 3, color 2
    holding_green_ball = ((state.agent.pocket[0] == 3) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == 2)).astype(jnp.float32)
    # Holding blue pyramid = tile 5, color 3
    holding_blue_pyramid = ((state.agent.pocket[0] == 5) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == 3)).astype(jnp.float32)

    # --- Grid meshgrid ---
    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')
    yy_f = yy.astype(jnp.float32)
    xx_f = xx.astype(jnp.float32)

    tile_ids = state.grid[:, :, 0]
    tile_colors = state.grid[:, :, 1]

    # --- Blue pyramid location (tile=5, color=3) ---
    blue_pyr_mask = (tile_ids == 5) & (tile_colors == 3)
    blue_pyr_count = jnp.sum(blue_pyr_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    blue_pyr_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * blue_pyr_mask) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0)
    blue_pyr_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * blue_pyr_mask) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0)
    blue_pyr_norm_y = blue_pyr_y / (H_f - 1)
    blue_pyr_norm_x = blue_pyr_x / (W_f - 1)
    blue_pyr_exists = jnp.clip(blue_pyr_count, 0.0, 1.0)
    # Relative position agent -> blue pyramid
    rel_blue_pyr_y = (blue_pyr_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_blue_pyr_x = (blue_pyr_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)
    dist_blue_pyr = (jnp.abs(blue_pyr_y - agent_y) + jnp.abs(blue_pyr_x - agent_x)) / (H_f + W_f - 2)

    # --- Yellow hex location (tile=11, color=5) ---
    yel_hex_mask = (tile_ids == 11) & (tile_colors == 5)
    yel_hex_count = jnp.sum(yel_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    yel_hex_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * yel_hex_mask) / jnp.maximum(yel_hex_count, 1.0)
    yel_hex_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * yel_hex_mask) / jnp.maximum(yel_hex_count, 1.0)
    yel_hex_norm_y = yel_hex_y / (H_f - 1)
    yel_hex_norm_x = yel_hex_x / (W_f - 1)
    yel_hex_exists = jnp.clip(yel_hex_count, 0.0, 1.0)
    # Relative position agent -> yellow hex
    rel_yel_hex_y = (yel_hex_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_yel_hex_x = (yel_hex_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)
    dist_yel_hex = (jnp.abs(yel_hex_y - agent_y) + jnp.abs(yel_hex_x - agent_x)) / (H_f + W_f - 2)

    # --- Green ball location (tile=3, color=2) in grid (before picking up) ---
    green_ball_mask = (tile_ids == 3) & (tile_colors == 2)
    green_ball_count = jnp.sum(green_ball_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    green_ball_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * green_ball_mask) / jnp.maximum(green_ball_count, 1.0)
    green_ball_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * green_ball_mask) / jnp.maximum(green_ball_count, 1.0)
    green_ball_exists = jnp.clip(green_ball_count, 0.0, 1.0)

    # --- Front tile info ---
    dy = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction][0]
    dx = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction][1]
    front_y = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.int32) + dy, 0, H - 1)
    front_x = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.int32) + dx, 0, W - 1)
    front_tile_id = state.grid[front_y, front_x, 0].astype(jnp.float32) / 12.0
    front_tile_color = state.grid[front_y, front_x, 1].astype(jnp.float32) / 11.0
    # Is front tile the blue pyramid?
    front_is_blue_pyr = ((state.grid[front_y, front_x, 0] == 5) & (state.grid[front_y, front_x, 1] == 3)).astype(jnp.float32)
    # Is front tile adjacent to yellow hex?
    front_adj_yel_hex = (
        (jnp.abs(front_y.astype(jnp.float32) - yel_hex_y) + jnp.abs(front_x.astype(jnp.float32) - yel_hex_x)) <= 1.0
    ).astype(jnp.float32)
    # Is front tile floor (can place)?
    front_is_floor = (state.grid[front_y, front_x, 0] == 1).astype(jnp.float32)

    # --- Adjacency: agent next to yellow hex ---
    agent_adj_yel_hex = (
        (jnp.abs(agent_y - yel_hex_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x - yel_hex_x)) <= 1.0
    ).astype(jnp.float32)

    # --- Door/locked door info for navigation ---
    locked_door_mask = (tile_ids == 8)
    closed_door_mask = (tile_ids == 9)
    locked_door_count = jnp.sum(locked_door_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    closed_door_count = jnp.sum(closed_door_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    # Mean locked door position
    ld_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * locked_door_mask) / jnp.maximum(locked_door_count, 1.0)
    ld_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * locked_door_mask) / jnp.maximum(locked_door_count, 1.0)
    rel_ld_y = (ld_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_ld_x = (ld_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)
    # Mean closed door position
    cd_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * closed_door_mask) / jnp.maximum(closed_door_count, 1.0)
    cd_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * closed_door_mask) / jnp.maximum(closed_door_count, 1.0)
    rel_cd_y = (cd_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_cd_x = (cd_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)

    # --- Step progress ---
    step_norm = state.step_num.astype(jnp.float32) / 400.0

    # --- Task phase indicators ---
    # Phase 0: need to pick up blue pyramid (blue_pyr_exists & pocket_empty)
    # Phase 1: holding green ball, need to place next to yellow hex
    phase_pick = (blue_pyr_exists * pocket_empty).astype(jnp.float32)
    phase_place = holding_green_ball

    # --- Local 5x5 view around agent ---
    VIEW = 5
    center = VIEW // 2  # 2
    local_tile_ids = []
    local_tile_colors = []
    for dy_l in range(-center, center + 1):
        for dx_l in range(-center, center + 1):
            gy = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.int32) + dy_l, 0, H - 1)
            gx = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.int32) + dx_l, 0, W - 1)
            local_tile_ids.append(state.grid[gy, gx, 0].astype(jnp.float32) / 12.0)
            local_tile_colors.append(state.grid[gy, gx, 1].astype(jnp.float32) / 11.0)
    local_tiles = jnp.array(local_tile_ids)      # 25
    local_colors = jnp.array(local_tile_colors)  # 25

    # --- Assemble observation ---
    obs = jnp.concatenate([
        # Agent state (7)
        jnp.array([norm_ay, norm_ax]),          # 2
        dir_oh,                                  # 4
        jnp.array([step_norm]),                  # 1

        # Pocket (4)
        jnp.array([pocket_tile, pocket_color, pocket_empty, holding_green_ball]),

        # Blue pyramid (6)
        jnp.array([blue_pyr_norm_y, blue_pyr_norm_x,
                   rel_blue_pyr_y, rel_blue_pyr_x,
                   dist_blue_pyr, blue_pyr_exists]),

        # Yellow hex (6)
        jnp.array([yel_hex_norm_y, yel_hex_norm_x,
                   rel_yel_hex_y, rel_yel_hex_x,
                   dist_yel_hex, yel_hex_exists]),

        # Green ball in grid (3)
        jnp.array([green_ball_y / (H_f - 1), green_ball_x / (W_f - 1), green_ball_exists]),

        # Front tile (5)
        jnp.array([front_tile_id, front_tile_color,
                   front_is_blue_pyr, front_adj_yel_hex, front_is_floor]),

        # Adjacency & task phase (4)
        jnp.array([agent_adj_yel_hex, phase_pick, phase_place, holding_blue_pyramid]),

        # Door info (5)
        jnp.array([locked_door_count / 10.0, closed_door_count / 10.0,
                   rel_ld_y, rel_ld_x, rel_cd_y]),  # partial

        # Local view (50)
        local_tiles,
        local_colors,
    ])

    return obs.astype(jnp.float32)
